name: Peanut Butter Dip
recipeInstructions:
1. Press onion through strainer to extract juice.
2. Mix 3 tablespoons of onion juice, peanut butter, lemon juice, and hot pepper sauce in a small bowl.
- This can be prepared up to 2 days in advance. Cover tightly and refrigerate.
- Bring the peanut butter dip to room temperature before serving.
3. Garnish with fresh chives.
4. Serve with assorted crackers or fresh vegetables.
